message:
feat: Consolidate build to only 3 core CLIs + qjsc

Remove installArtifact() calls for optional/alternative binaries:
- edgebox-rosetta, edgebox-arm64 (alternative runtimes)
- edgebox-wizer, edgebox-wasm-opt, edgebox-freeze (embedded in edgeboxc)
- edgebox-sandbox (optional)
- edgebox (cli.zig wrapper, keep WAMR version)

Result: zig-out/bin/ contains only:
- edgebox (main runner)
- edgeboxd (daemon)
- edgeboxc (builder)
- qjsc (bytecode compiler, needed by edgeboxc)

All removed tools are still accessible via build steps if needed:
- zig build runner-rosetta
- zig build wizer
- zig build freeze
etc.
